message:
feat: Add vector index SQL and WritableDataFrame APIs

WASM SQL Executor:
- CREATE/DROP/SHOW VECTOR INDEX commands
- Model validation (minilm=384d, clip=512d, openai)
- Table/column existence validation

Browser JS wrapper:
- WritableDataFrame.fromRecords/fromColumns
- df.saveTo() with ifExists options
- vault.df() and vault.tables() methods
- Human-readable error message mapping
